title: Pseudencyclia campylostalix
intro: There is not enough information available on Pseudencyclia campylostalix to write the requested paragraph.
taxonomy: Pseudencyclia campylostalix is a species of flowering plant in the family APOCYNACEAE. It is native to Mexico and belongs to the genus Pseudencyclia of orchids. The classification of Pseudencyclia campylostalix is further grouped under the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. The plant's classification also falls under the order Gentianales. The exact classification of Pseudencyclia campylostalix is within the broader taxonomic ranks of kingdom Plantae.
